items.title_zh: Linux内核维护者崩溃了！AI每天狂塞10份漏洞报告，想摸会鱼都难
items.summary_zh: 量子位：AI 自动化安全扫描工具每天向 Linux 内核维护者提交多达 10 份漏洞报告，且大多数报告准确无误，令维护者疲于应对补丁工作。这一现象引发业界对 AI 辅助安全研究规模化带来的工程压力与治理挑战的广泛讨论。

items.title_zh: GPT-6，曝光了
items.summary_zh: 量子位：有关 OpenAI GPT-6 的内部细节被曝光，报道显示该模型彻底面向 AGI 目标设计，在架构和能力目标上与此前系列有重大差异，OpenAI 正全力押注这一下一代旗舰模型。

items.title_en: Towards end-to-end automation of AI research
items.title_zh: AI 研究全自动化初现曙光
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A Nature paper demonstrates an AI system capable of producing research papers with minimal human involvement — even passing the first round of peer review at a major ML conference workshop. The finding raises questions about the future role of human researchers and the integrity of scientific publishing.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：《自然》刊发论文，展示了一套几乎无需人工干预即可生成研究论文的 AI 系统，甚至通过了顶级机器学习会议分会场的首轮同行评审，引发科研诚信与人类研究者未来角色的深层讨论。

items.title_zh: 为了不跟龙虾抢电脑用，有人开始造Agent专属的"三无"硬件，比Mac Mini+存储便宜
items.summary_zh: 量子位：随着本地运行 AI Agent（昵称「小龙虾」）需求激增，一位创业者推出专为 Agent 设计的 Agent Computer 硬件——无多余外设、专注本地推理与数据存储，定价低于 Mac Mini 加额外存储组合，主打隐私与专属算力。

items.title_en: LLM Wiki – An "Idea File" for Language Model Research (Karpathy)
items.title_zh: Karpathy 分享大语言模型研究想法清单
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Andrej Karpathy shared a GitHub Gist serving as a running "idea file" for LLM research directions, covering topics such as architecture improvements, training techniques, evaluation methods, and open problems in the field. The list quickly gained community attention.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：Andrej Karpathy 在 GitHub Gist 公开了一份持续更新的 LLM 研究想法清单，涵盖架构改进、训练技巧、评估方法及未解难题，迅速引发社区热议。

items.title_en: Show HN: Real-time AI (audio/video in, voice out) on an M3 Pro with Gemma E2B
items.title_zh: Parlor：M3 Pro 本地运行 Gemma E2B 实时音视频 AI 对话
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A developer demonstrated Parlor, a local real-time AI assistant running on Apple M3 Pro using Google's Gemma E2B model. It accepts audio and video input and delivers voice output entirely on-device without cloud dependencies.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：开发者展示 Parlor，在 Apple M3 Pro 上基于 Gemma E2B 本地运行的实时 AI 助手，支持音频和视频输入，以语音输出，完全设备端运行，无需云端依赖。

items.title_en: Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens
items.title_zh: sllm：多人共享GPU节点，不限 Token 的 LLM 推理服务
items.summary_en: Hacker News: sllm is an open-source tool that allows developers to share a GPU node for LLM inference with no token limits. The project aims to make high-throughput model inference more accessible and cost-effective for small teams and researchers.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：sllm 是一款开源工具，支持多名开发者共享同一 GPU 节点运行 LLM 推理，且无 Token 限制。该项目旨在让小团队和研究人员以更低成本获得高吞吐量的模型推理能力。

items.title_en: Emotion Concepts and Their Function in a Large Language Model
items.title_zh: 大语言模型中情感概念的功能研究
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic researchers published a study exploring how emotion-like concepts emerge and function within large language models. The paper investigates whether LLMs develop internal representations analogous to human emotion and how these influence model behavior and outputs.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Anthropic 研究人员发表论文，探讨大语言模型内部是否形成类似情感的概念，以及这些概念如何影响模型行为和输出。研究揭示了 LLM 内部表征与人类情感的潜在类比关系。

items.title_zh: 编程 Agent 的核心组成
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Sebastian Raschka's article breaks down the essential architectural components of a coding agent — including planning, tool use, code execution, memory, and feedback loops — and discusses design trade-offs relevant to building production-grade AI software agents.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：Sebastian Raschka 发文分析编程 Agent 的核心架构组件，包括规划、工具调用、代码执行、记忆和反馈循环，并探讨构建生产级 AI 软件 Agent 的设计取舍。

items.title_en: A folk musician became a target for AI fakes and a copyright troll
items.title_zh: 一位民谣音乐人成为AI造假和版权流氓的双重受害者
items.summary_en: The Verge: Murphy Campbell, a folk musician, found herself targeted both by AI-generated fake content mimicking her work and a copyright troll exploiting the situation. The case highlights the compounding legal and reputational risks that independent artists face in the generative AI era.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：民谣音乐人 Murphy Campbell 遭遇双重困境——AI 生成的仿冒内容泛滥，同时版权流氓趁机发起诉讼。此案凸显了生成式 AI 时代独立艺术家面临的法律与声誉叠加风险。

items.title_en: Really, you made this without AI? Prove it
items.title_zh: 证明你的作品不是AI生成的
items.summary_en: The Verge: As generative AI increasingly mimics human creative output, The Verge explores the growing movement to label human-made content. With platforms like Instagram and existing C2PA standards failing to adequately distinguish AI from human work, advocates argue it may be more practical to certify and fingerprint human-made content rather than flag AI output. Multiple authentication solutions have emerged but face adoption challenges.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：随着生成式AI越来越能模仿人类创作，The Verge 探讨了为人类作品贴标签的新兴运动。Instagram 负责人建议为真实媒体加指纹而非标记AI内容，现有C2PA标准效果有限。多种人类创作认证方案已涌现，但面临推广挑战。

items.title_en: AI Whiz Kids Dropped Out of College and Got Investors to Pay Their Bills
items.title_zh: AI神童辍学创业，投资人买单
items.summary_en: [title-only] WSJ: Young AI entrepreneurs are dropping out of college and attracting venture capital funding to pursue AI startups, reflecting intense investor interest in early-stage AI talent.
items.summary_zh: WSJ：AI领域年轻创业者纷纷辍学，吸引风险投资支持其AI创业公司，反映出投资者对早期AI人才的强烈兴趣。

items.title_zh: 日调用量超万亿破纪录！阿里千问3.6Plus登顶全球模型调用量榜首
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴：发布仅1天的Qwen3.6-Plus在全球大模型API聚合平台OpenRouter的日榜登顶榜首，日调用量突破1.4万亿Token，打破该平台单日单模型调用量全球纪录，较上线当晚激增711%。Qwen3.6-Plus在国际大模型竞技场Arena编程能力子榜排名中国第一，使阿里成为编程能力全球排名第二的AI机构。

items.title_zh: Django创始人：30岁程序员受AI冲击最大
items.summary_zh: 量子位：Django联合创始人Simon Willison表示，自2025年11月起AI写代码能力跨越临界点，高质量代码产出量提升30至40倍，单日原型从1至2天变为3小时出3套方案。他警告30岁程序员受冲击最大，因为刚积累的熟练度被AI直接替代，而资深工程师的20年架构经验反被AI放大。美国律师行业因AI幻觉搞砸案子的记录已累计1228起。

items.title_zh: 19岁，常青藤辍学，这群中国年轻人重构了AI记忆
items.summary_zh: 量子位：一群19岁左右的常青藤辍学中国年轻人推出AI记忆框架M-FLOW，突破传统RAG仅做语义相似匹配的局限。M-FLOW采用图结构从细粒度Entity到完整Episode的锥形搜索机制，在多轮对话、长期记忆、多跳推理三大场景下性能显著优于Mem0、Graphiti、Cognee等主流方案，覆盖29项能力维度大多实现完整支持。

items.title_en: Anthropic Is Having a Moment in the Private Markets; SpaceX Could Spoil the Party
items.title_zh: Anthropic 在私募二级市场走俏，SpaceX IPO 或分流资金
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Rainmaker Securities president Glen Anderson says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active, with Anthropic emerging as the hottest trade. OpenAI has been losing secondary market momentum, and SpaceX's anticipated IPO could divert institutional appetite away from private AI company shares.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Rainmaker Securities 总裁 Glen Anderson 表示，私募股权二级市场从未如此活跃，Anthropic 已成为最热门交易标的，OpenAI 热度有所下滑。SpaceX 即将到来的 IPO 可能分流机构投资者对 AI 私募股权的兴趣。

items.title_en: OpenAI Cap Table Leak Reveals Microsoft's 18x Return, SoftBank's $50B Gain, and a CEO Who Owns Nothing
items.title_zh: OpenAI 股权表泄露：微软回报18倍，奥特曼持股为零
items.summary_en: Forbes: A leaked OpenAI cap table reveals that Microsoft stands to earn approximately 18 times its investment return, while SoftBank has seen a $50 billion paper gain. The table also shows that CEO Sam Altman currently holds no equity stake in the company, a notable detail given ongoing discussions about his compensation.
items.summary_zh: Forbes：泄露的 OpenAI 股权表显示，微软的投资回报约为18倍，软银账面浮盈约500亿美元。股权表还揭示 CEO 山姆·奥特曼目前不持有公司任何股权，在外界广泛讨论其薪酬方案的背景下尤为引人注目。

items.title_en: Anthropic Bans Third-Party Harnesses Like OpenClaw from Using Claude Subscriptions
items.title_zh: Anthropic 禁止第三方客户端使用 Claude 订阅额度
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Starting April 4th at 3PM ET, Claude subscribers will no longer be able to use their subscription limits with third-party tools such as OpenClaw. Users wishing to continue using OpenClaw with Claude must switch to a separate pay-as-you-go billing option, effectively decoupling third-party harness access from subscription plans. The change comes as OpenClaw founder Peter Steinberger has joined OpenAI.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：从美国东部时间4月4日下午3点起，Claude 订阅用户将无法再通过 OpenClaw 等第三方工具使用订阅额度，需切换至独立的按量计费方式。此举有效将第三方客户端与订阅套餐解耦，时机与 OpenClaw 创始人 Peter Steinberger 加入 OpenAI 高度吻合。

items.title_en: Claude Code Found a Linux Vulnerability Hidden for 23 Years
items.title_zh: Claude Code 发现隐藏23年的 Linux 内核漏洞
items.summary_en: mtlynch.io: A developer used Anthropic's Claude Code to audit a Linux kernel subsystem and discovered a security vulnerability that had been present in the codebase for over 23 years. The finding highlights Claude Code's capability as a deep code analysis and security auditing tool, potentially surpassing conventional static analyzers in surfacing complex, long-latent bugs.
items.summary_zh: mtlynch.io：一位开发者使用 Anthropic 的 Claude Code 对 Linux 内核子系统进行安全审计，发现了一个潜伏超过23年的安全漏洞，展示了 Claude Code 在深度代码分析与安全审计方面超越传统静态分析工具的潜力。

items.title_en: Research Finds AI Users Scarily Willing to Surrender Their Cognition to LLMs
items.title_zh: 研究：大量用户轻信 AI 错误答案，主动放弃独立思考
items.summary_en: Ars Technica: New research finds that large majorities of AI users uncritically accept faulty AI-generated answers even when demonstrably wrong. The study raises concerns about 'cognitive surrender,' where users defer logical reasoning to AI systems without verification, potentially eroding critical thinking skills at scale over time.
items.summary_zh: Ars Technica：最新研究发现，大多数 AI 用户会不加批判地接受错误的 AI 答案。该研究对「认知让渡」现象发出警告——用户将逻辑推理拱手交给 AI 而不加验证，可能在大规模用户群体中长期侵蚀批判性思维能力。
